signin_description: Continue where you left off and keep the calendar, assistant, and workspace in one calm flow.
signin_bullet_1: Instant access to your calendar, reminders, and shared spaces.
signin_bullet_2: A compact Apple-like shell that keeps focus on the task.
signin_bullet_3: Secure login with Google or email and password.
signin_subtitle: Use your existing account to open the workspace.
signup_description: Create your CalendAir account and bring calendar, assistant, and shared planning into one branded space.
signup_bullet_1: Set up your account in a few guided steps.
signup_bullet_2: Keep preferences, events, and teams under one profile.
signup_bullet_3: Unlock the full branded experience across the app shell.
signup_subtitle: Pick a password once and start with a clean workspace.
choose_sign_in_signup: Choose sign in or sign up in one step.
